title: CIE Planner Agent Input Payload
description: Payload schema for the PlannerAgent _execute step. Validated against agent_input.payload before intent extraction.

user_natural_language_prompt.description: Natural language research objective provided by the user.

dataset_structural_metadata.description: Structural metadata using var_n column aliases only. Never contains raw data rows.

inject_raw_data_rows.description: Must always be false. Injection of raw data rows is prohibited (PROJECT_RULES AP-012).
